title: SQL: UNIQUE constraint not checked
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Bob') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = 'Bob';
